paper_title: Sediment Core Analysis and Foraminifera-bound δ15N Measurement

methods.method_name: Sediment Core Retrieval and Age Model Update
methods.description: Process for retrieving sediment cores from the EEP and updating their age models using radiocarbon dating and stratigraphic correlation.

steps.description: Sediment cores ME0005-24JC and ME0005-27JC were retrieved from the EEP.
steps.searchable_summary: retrieve sediment cores from specified locations

steps.description: The age models for both sediment cores have been updated by Dubois et al. (2014) using radiocarbon ages and stratigraphic correlation.
steps.searchable_summary: update age models using radiocarbon dating and stratigraphic correlation

steps.description: In core ME-27, three additional 14C dates were included at specific depths.
steps.searchable_summary: include additional radiocarbon dates for core ME-27

steps.description: All radiocarbon ages were calibrated with Calib 7.1 and the marine calibration curve MARINE13.
steps.searchable_summary: calibrate radiocarbon ages using Calib 7.1 and MARINE13

steps.description: Ages were linearly interpolated between the stratigraphic tie points.
steps.searchable_summary: interpolate ages between stratigraphic tie points

methods.description: Procedure for measuring δ15N in foraminifera using the persulfate-denitrifier technique and correcting for procedural blanks.

steps.description: ∼3-5 mg of foraminifera were picked, cut open with a scalpel, and underwent chemical cleaning.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare foraminifera samples by cutting and cleaning

steps.description: Organic N was released by dissolution with HCl and converted to nitrate in a basic potassium persulfate solution.
steps.searchable_summary: convert organic N to nitrate using HCl and potassium persulfate

steps.description: The nitrate concentration was determined by chemiluminescence.
An aliquot of the nitrate solution was converted to nitrous oxide by denitrifying bacteria.
steps.searchable_summary: convert nitrate to nitrous oxide using denitrifying bacteria

steps.description: The N isotopic composition of the N2O was measured with a mass spectrometer.
steps.searchable_summary: measure N isotopic composition using mass spectrometry

steps.description: FB-δ15N data were corrected for the contribution of the oxidation procedural blank.
steps.searchable_summary: correct FB-δ15N data for procedural blank

steps.description: Linear offsets in FB-δ15N were corrected by applying offsets to whole batches.
steps.searchable_summary: apply batch offsets to correct linear offsets in FB-δ15N

steps.description: Replicate FB-δ15N analyses for each depth were averaged.
